tasks.title: Fix asset path prefix in Blade templates (remove ./public/ from asset() calls)
tasks.description: Removed redundant public/ prefix from all asset() calls. Fixed 147 occurrences across 59 files (57 Blade templates + 2 PHP files). Removed public/public symlink workaround.

tasks.title: Fix PHP 8.4 nullable parameter deprecations in app/ code
tasks.description: Added explicit ?Type nullable syntax to all typed parameters defaulting to null. Fixed 19 parameters across 12 PHP files in app/.

tasks.title: Fix Vue 'component' not defined in wizard Company.vue
tasks.description: Added missing 'component' data property to wizardAction mixin. Both Company.vue and Currencies.vue reference it in templates and the mixin sets it in onEjetItem(), but it was never declared in data().

tasks.title: Fix serviceworker.js and manifest.json 500 errors
tasks.description: Copied serviceworker.js and manifest.json to public/ directory. Files were only in project root, which works with Apache .htaccess rewrites but not with artisan serve. Originals kept in root for Apache compatibility.

tasks.title: Create /start-bookkeeping-services slash command for dev environment startup
tasks.description: Create a Claude Code skill at .claude/skills/start-bookkeeping-services/SKILL.md that starts all services needed for local dev. Steps: 1) Start Docker MySQL container (docker start akaunting-db, or docker run if not exists), 2) Wait for MySQL to accept connections, 3) Start php artisan serve in background, 4) Verify both services are healthy, 5) Report URLs and status. Should use disable-model-invocation: true since it has side effects.
